title: betula × intermedia nothovar. sukatschewii
intro: Betula × intermedia nothovar. sukatschewii is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Betula pendula and Betula pubescens, commonly known as silver birch and downy birch. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils. The health benefits of Betula × intermedia nothovar. sukatschewii include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
